creator: gabor@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Entry added, thanks! As it is a global movement, it was a bit difficult to put 
this into a category of place. I added it under "North America" since most of 
the member BUGS seem to be in North America. 
You will see the entry on the website some hours later, when our pages have 
been rebuilt from the repository.
